metadata.description: Central durable doctrine for ADR/spec classification, placement, frontmatter, and adoption across Elegy and downstream repos.
metadata.summary: Apply the central Elegy documentation doctrine: classify, place, write, validate, and adopt ADRs, specs, guides, notes, and roadmap material consistently.
metadata.author: Elegy Contributors

capabilities.name: Classify Documentation Intent
capabilities.description: Decide whether a new doc is an ADR, spec, guide, note, or roadmap entry based on the central Elegy doctrine.

output.description: Classification hints derived from existing frontmatter, authority roots, and freshness posture.

capabilities.name: Scaffold ADR
capabilities.description: Create a new ADR under docs/adr/ using the compact Elegy ADR template with required frontmatter.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: ADR title; slug is derived from the title.

output.description: Scaffold result envelope listing the new ADR path and the config posture.

capabilities.name: Scaffold Spec
capabilities.description: Create a new spec under docs/specs/ using the compact Elegy spec template with required frontmatter.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Spec title; slug is derived from the title.

output.description: Scaffold result envelope listing the new spec path and the config posture.

capabilities.name: Validate Docs Objectively
capabilities.description: Run objective validation across the docs corpus for frontmatter, status, links, dates, and freshness warnings.

output.description: Validation envelope with objective findings grouped by severity.

capabilities.name: Init Docs Config
capabilities.description: Create .elegy/docs.yaml in a target repo with sensible defaults for ADR/spec paths, derived surfaces, and freshness warnings.

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: When true, preview the init without writing the file.

output.description: Init result envelope with created and skipped paths.

constraints.description: This skill ships the central doctrine; downstream repos only override local paths and triggers via .elegy/docs.yaml.
Validation covers only objective properties: metadata, statuses, links, dates, freshness warnings. Prose quality and architecture taste stay with humans.

triggers.description: When a new document needs classification as ADR, spec, guide, note, or roadmap entry.
When a durable decision needs an ADR scaffolded with the central template.
When implementation-facing behavior needs a spec scaffolded with the central template.
When docs need objective validation for metadata, status, links, dates, and freshness.
